name: Simple Research Methodology Flowchart
input: Create a flowchart showing a basic research methodology: Literature Review leads to Hypothesis Formation, which leads to Study Design. Study Design branches into Data Collection and Ethical Approval (both needed). After both complete, they converge at Data Analysis, which leads to Results Interpretation, and finally Publication.
qualityCriteria: All 7 nodes are present and labeled correctly
Flow direction is top-down (TD) or left-right (LR)
Branch from Study Design shows parallel paths
Convergence at Data Analysis is clear
Valid Mermaid syntax that parses without errors
napkinBenchmark: Clean vertical flowchart with rounded boxes, subtle color gradient from blue (start) to green (end), clear arrows with no crossing, each node sized to fit its label with comfortable padding.
